mapper.select: SELECT LOCKER_PRE_IDX, LOCKER_PRE_NAME, LOCKER_PRE_TYPE, START_DATE, END_DATE , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LOCKER WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = a.LOCKER_PRE_IDX AND DELETE_YN = 'N') AS LOCKER_COUNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LOCKER_REQ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = a.LOCKER_PRE_IDX AND DELETE_YN = 'N') AS LOCKER_REQ_COUNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LOCKER_REQ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = a.LOCKER_PRE_IDX AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND (LOCKER_IDX > 0)) AS LOCKER_USE_COUNT FROM LOCKER_PRE a WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY START_DATE

SELECT EXCURSIONS_IDX, START_DATE , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND EXCURSIONS_IDX = a.EXCURSIONS_IDX) AS APPLY_COUNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND EXCURSIONS_IDX = a.EXCURSIONS_IDX AND APPLY_STATE = 3) AS APPLY_OK_COUNT FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS a WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND START_DATE BETWEEN #{start_date} AND #{end_date} ORDER BY START_DATE

SELECT START_DATE, COUNT(*) AS EXCURSIONS_COUNT, SUM(APPLY_COUNT) AS APPLY_COUNT, SUM(APPLY_OK_COUNT) AS APPLY_OK_COUNT FROM ( SELECT EXCURSIONS_IDX, SUBSTR(START_DATE, 1, 7) START_DATE , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND EXCURSIONS_IDX = a.EXCURSIONS_IDX) AS APPLY_COUNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND EXCURSIONS_IDX = a.EXCURSIONS_IDX AND APPLY_STATE = 3) AS APPLY_OK_COUNT FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS a WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND START_DATE BETWEEN #{start_date} AND #{end_date} ORDER BY START_DATE ) A GROUP BY START_DATE ORDER BY START_DATE

SELECT START_DATE, COUNT(*) AS EXCURSIONS_COUNT, SUM(APPLY_COUNT) AS APPLY_COUNT, SUM(APPLY_OK_COUNT) AS APPLY_OK_COUNT FROM ( SELECT EXCURSIONS_IDX, SUBSTR(START_DATE, 1, 4) START_DATE , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND EXCURSIONS_IDX = a.EXCURSIONS_IDX) AS APPLY_COUNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND EXCURSIONS_IDX = a.EXCURSIONS_IDX AND APPLY_STATE = 3) AS APPLY_OK_COUNT FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS a WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND START_DATE BETWEEN #{start_date} AND #{end_date} ORDER BY START_DATE ) A GROUP BY START_DATE ORDER BY START_DATE

SELECT FACILITY_NAME, USE_DATE, LIMIT_COUNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FACILITY_REQ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND FACILITY_IDX = a.FACILITY_IDX) AS APPLY_COUNT FROM FACILITY_MANAGE a WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND USE_DATE BETWEEN #{start_date} AND #{end_date} ORDER BY USE_DATE

SELECT USE_DATE, SUM(LIMIT_COUNT) AS LIMIT_COUNT, SUM(APPLY_COUNT) AS APPLY_COUNT, COUNT(*) AS FACILITY_COUNT FROM ( SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, FACILITY_NAME, SUBSTR(USE_DATE, 1, 7) AS USE_DATE, LIMIT_COUNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FACILITY_REQ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND FACILITY_IDX = a.FACILITY_IDX) AS APPLY_COUNT FROM FACILITY_MANAGE a WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND USE_DATE BETWEEN #{start_date} AND #{end_date} ORDER BY USE_DATE ) GROUP BY USE_DATE

SELECT USE_DATE, SUM(LIMIT_COUNT) AS LIMIT_COUNT, SUM(APPLY_COUNT) AS APPLY_COUNT, COUNT(*) AS FACILITY_COUNT FROM ( SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, FACILITY_NAME, SUBSTR(USE_DATE, 1, 4) AS USE_DATE, LIMIT_COUNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FACILITY_REQ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND FACILITY_IDX = a.FACILITY_IDX) AS APPLY_COUNT FROM FACILITY_MANAGE a WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND USE_DATE BETWEEN #{start_date} AND #{end_date} ORDER BY USE_DATE ) GROUP BY USE_DATE
